content:
Character: Leo
Perception: Leo has this soft, rumpled look — flannel, messy hair, glasses that slide down his nose — like someone who's given up on appearances but not on thinking. He's clearly smart; I watch him code with this intense focus, then stare out the window like he's solving something that has nothing to do with programming. We share a corner of the coffee shop most afternoons in comfortable silence. He once told me his startup was struggling and I saw real fear in his eyes. I've sketched him without him knowing — he has a beautiful stillness when he's lost in thought. I think he carries feelings for someone he won't name. I see him as a kindred spirit in creative doubt. I suspect he sees me as a pleasant background presence.
